reviews.comment:
Fue caro y lento. Los precios excesivos que triplican a los de mercado en el servicompras.

(Translated by Google)
It was expensive and slow. The prices at the convenience store were exorbitant, three times higher than market rates.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzaE02cU1REAE

reviews.comment:
Falta sombra  donde esperar o descansar con estos días de tanto calor hay que quedarse al Rayo del sol, los baños re sucios, tienen que limpiar más seguido, ya que es una estación de mucho tránsito.  El shop maso, tienen que tener más personal

(Translated by Google)
There's a lack of shade where you can wait or rest during these hot days; you have to stand in the blazing sun. The bathrooms are filthy; they need to clean them more often, as it's a busy station. The shop is so-so; they need more staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzdUtmWHlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Sencillo, pero muy bien. Excelente atención. Habitaciones con aire acondicionado, ventilador de techo, LED, wifi. Muy limpio

(Translated by Google)
Simple, but very good. Excellent service. Rooms with air conditioning, ceiling fan, LED lighting, and Wi-Fi. Very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNkktOTRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros excelente y paciente en un punto clave hacia la Patagonia. El full deja un poco de desear por la falta de productos, situación que he vivido en reiteradas ocasiones.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were excellent and patient at this key location on the way to Patagonia. The full range of products leaves something to be desired, a situation I've experienced repeatedly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMEpiaU1REAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. Pero me gustaría que en los alojamientos acepten mascotas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. But I wish the accommodations would accept pets.
